name: GOLFTEC Annapolis
about: GOLFTEC Annapolis is a golf training facility that focuses on data-driven improvement through technology and professional coaching. The center utilizes advanced motion measurement technology like OPTIMOTION, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide detailed swing feedback. Lessons are tailored to individual goals, with coaches creating personalized game plans for both swing evaluation and on-course improvement. The facility offers club fittings, practice memberships, and a pro shop, all aimed at accelerating a golfer's progress in a controlled indoor environment. While the specific page was not found, GOLFTEC as a brand emphasizes a structured, analytical approach to golf improvement.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using launch monitors and video analysis
Personalized coaching plans for structured improvement
Advanced technology like OPTIMOTION for precise swing tracking
One-stop shop for lessons, fittings, and practice
Access to certified PGA coaches and training bays

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitor used for club fitting and lessons, measuring ball and club data for optimization

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf clubs. GOLFTEC also offers club fittings where you can be fitted for new equipment and purchase clubs directly through them.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink policies are not specified. Please contact the center directly to confirm their policy on outside items.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time required to play a full 18 holes on a simulator is not specified and can vary depending on the simulator software and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC is kid-friendly, offering coaching and technology suitable for juniors and youth looking to improve their game.
